firefox     817   alice 79u  IPv4 0xfeedface              0t0  TCP 192.168.6.204:50000->1.2.3.4:443 (ESTABLISHED)
firefox     817   alice 80u  IPv6 0xdeadbeef              0t0  TCP [::1]:50001->[::1]:443 (ESTABLISHED)
